seo.title: Django implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Django projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical verification path for transitioning Django applications from development to production environments, focusing on performance, security, and scalability.

items.title: Disable Debug Mode
items.description: Set DEBUG=False in the production settings to prevent the exposure of sensitive tracebacks and environment variables.

items.title: Secret Key Externalization
items.description: Ensure SECRET_KEY is loaded from an environment variable or a secret manager, and is not hardcoded in the repository.

items.title: Secure Cookie Settings
items.description: Set SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE=True and CSRF_COOKIE_SECURE=True to ensure cookies are only transmitted over HTTPS.

items.title: Host Header Validation
items.description: Define ALLOWED_HOSTS with specific domain names to prevent HTTP Host header attacks.

items.title: HSTS Implementation
items.description: Set SECURE_HSTS_SECONDS, SECURE_HSTS_INCLUDE_SUBDOMAINS, and SECURE_HSTS_PRELOAD to enforce SSL at the browser level.

items.title: Database Connection Pooling
items.description: Set CONN_MAX_AGE to a value (e.g., 60) to persist database connections and reduce overhead on high-traffic sites.

items.title: Index Verification
items.description: Audit models for db_index=True or Meta.indexes on fields used in filtering and ordering to prevent full table scans.

items.title: N+1 Query Audit
items.description: Review views and serializers for missing select_related or prefetch_related calls on foreign key and many-to-many relationships.

items.title: Database Migration Dry-Run
items.description: Verify that all migrations have been applied and that no pending model changes exist via 'python manage.py makemigrations --check'.

items.title: Read-Replica Routing
items.description: Configure a database router if using read-replicas to offload SELECT queries from the primary write database.

items.title: Global Throttling Policy
items.description: Configure DEFAULT_THROTTLE_CLASSES and DEFAULT_THROTTLE_RATES in DRF settings to prevent API abuse.

items.title: Mandatory Pagination
items.description: Enforce DEFAULT_PAGINATION_CLASS for all list views to prevent large database dumps from crashing the application.

items.title: CORS Whitelist
items.description: Configure django-cors-headers to only allow requests from trusted frontend origins.

items.title: Schema Documentation
items.description: Generate and verify OpenAPI/Swagger documentation using drf-spectacular or similar tools for consumer integration.

items.title: Renderer Optimization
items.description: Remove BrowsableAPIRenderer from production settings to reduce response payload size and overhead.

items.title: Broker Connectivity and Security
items.description: Ensure Celery/Redis connections use TLS/SSL and that the broker is not accessible from the public internet.

items.title: Worker Concurrency Limits
items.description: Configure worker concurrency based on available CPU/RAM to prevent OOM (Out of Memory) kills during peak loads.

items.title: Task Result Expiry
items.description: Set CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND_MAX_AGE to prevent the result backend database from growing indefinitely.

items.title: Dead Letter Queues
items.description: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff and a dead-letter queue for failing background tasks.

items.title: ASGI Timeout Configuration
items.description: If using async views, configure the ASGI server (e.g., Daphne/Uvicorn) timeouts to match the expected load-balancer timeout.

items.title: Manifest Storage
items.description: Use ManifestStaticFilesStorage to enable cache-busting by appending MD5 hashes to filenames.

items.title: WhiteNoise Integration
items.description: Configure WhiteNoise or a dedicated CDN to serve static files efficiently without hitting the Django process.

items.title: Media File Externalization
items.description: Ensure MEDIA_ROOT is pointed to a persistent volume or cloud storage (S3) rather than ephemeral container storage.

items.title: Collection Verification
items.description: Run 'python manage.py collectstatic --noinput' as part of the CI/CD pipeline to verify asset integrity.

items.title: Compression Implementation
items.description: Enable Gzip or Brotli compression for static assets via WhiteNoise or Nginx configuration.

items.title: Structured Logging
items.description: Configure JSON logging formatters to allow ELK or Splunk stacks to parse Django logs effectively.

items.title: Error Tracking Integration
items.description: Initialize Sentry or a similar SDK to capture unhandled exceptions and performance bottlenecks.

items.title: Health Check Endpoint
items.description: Implement a /health/ endpoint that checks database and cache connectivity for load balancer liveness probes.

items.title: Query Logging Thresholds
items.description: Set up alerts for slow queries exceeding a specific millisecond threshold in the database layer.

items.title: Log Rotation
items.description: Ensure file-based logs (if used) have rotation policies to prevent disk exhaustion.
